prompt: I want to understand the complete structure of this model — every named range, what sheet it's on, whether it has a formula or raw value, and whether there are intent notes.
assertions: Runs idfa_ops.py inspect and discovers all 20 Named Ranges
Distinguishes Assumptions layer (6 Inp_ ranges) from Calculations layer (14 ranges with formulas)
Reports whether intent notes (comments) are present
Presents information organized by layer, not as raw JSON dump
Reports the model uses Named Range references exclusively
